title: Citrusy Crisp Filipino Anchovy Salad
description: A refreshing monsoon salad that balances tangy calamansi and lemon with salty anchovy fillets, crisp cucumber, and a drizzle of olive oil for a diabetic-friendly bite.

ingredients.name: Anchovy fillets (dried)
ingredients.notes: reconstitute in warm water 10 min, drain

instructions: Place the dried anchovy fillets in a bowl of warm water; let soak for 10 minutes, then drain and pat dry.
In a large mixing bowl, combine julienned cucumber, sliced red onion, halved cherry tomatoes, and chopped cilantro.
Add the soaked anchovy fillets to the vegetables and toss gently.
Whisk together low-sodium soy sauce, olive oil, calamansi juice, lemon juice, and black pepper to make a dressing.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss until everything is evenly coated.
Let the salad sit for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving.
If desired, sprinkle thinly sliced fresh chili on top for a hint of heat.
